lb-b5ig.title: Structured JSONL logging with live stream formatter
lb-b5ig.description: Port physarum's stream-json + formatter pattern to ralph_harness. Switch from plain --verbose text to --output-format stream-json (JSONL), pipe through tee (durable storage) then TypeScript formatter (live colored terminal output). Test in ralph-test-13 before lifting to harness.

lb-chol.title: Update host scripts for JSONL pipeline
lb-chol.description: Update scripts/run.sh: add --raw flag support (skip formatter for scripting), change log extension to .jsonl, pipe docker output through 'tee $log_file | bun run stream-fmt.ts', update symlink to latest.jsonl. Update scripts/run-epic.sh: add logging pipeline (currently has none), add --raw flag, pipe through tee + formatter to logs/epic-EPIC-TIMESTAMP.jsonl, add latest.jsonl symlink.

lb-g4rj.title: Teach agent it can self-modify (Dockerfile, deps) across loop iterations
lb-g4rj.description: The agent reinstalls Rust every run because the container is ephemeral. It doesn't realize that changes committed to git (like modifying the Dockerfile to add Rust) persist across loop iterations. Add guidance to CLAUDE.md or the runner prompt so the agent knows it can modify its own infrastructure and benefit from it in subsequent runs.

lb-h3ux.title: Init script — adopt harness into existing repo
lb-h3ux.description: An init.sh script that copies harness files into an existing repo, handling conflicts with existing CLAUDE.md, .gitignore, and .claude/settings.local.json. Run as: scripts/init.sh /path/to/existing-repo. End state is identical to having used the GitHub template.

lb-j4ge.title: Create ralph-test-13 test bed
lb-j4ge.description: Initialize a new repo at /home/mdaum/devel/coobeeyon/ralph-test-13. Copy structure from ralph-test-12 (scripts/, CLAUDE.md, SPEC.md, .env.example, .gitignore, Cargo.toml, src/, etc). This is our sandbox for testing logging changes without affecting the harness. Push to GitHub as coobeeyon/ralph-test-13.

lb-kn83.title: Switch claude to stream-json output format
lb-kn83.description: Update scripts/runner/run.sh: add --output-format stream-json to claude invocation. Remove redundant inner tee and logdir/logfile setup (container is ephemeral, host tee persists logs). Update scripts/runner/run-epic.sh: add --output-format stream-json, change per-task log extension from .log to .jsonl (keep inner tee here since multiple tasks run in one container).

lb-lhgt.title: Update summary.sh and .gitignore for JSONL
lb-lhgt.description: Update scripts/summary.sh: change default from latest.log to latest.jsonl, change basename stripping from .log to .jsonl. Claude/haiku parses JSONL natively so prompt needs no change. Update .gitignore: add *.jsonl (currently only has *.log).

lb-pz2p.title: Create scripts/stream-fmt.ts formatter
lb-pz2p.description: Port physarum's scripts/reflect-stream-fmt.ts to scripts/stream-fmt.ts. Nearly verbatim copy — it's already generic. Handles: system/init, assistant (tool_use for Bash/Read/Edit/Write/Grep/Glob/Agent, thinking, text), user (tool_result with code block collapsing), result (done summary with cost/turns). TTY-aware colors. Suppresses noisy tools (TodoRead/Write, TaskCreate/Get/Update/List, Read). Source: /home/mdaum/devel/coobeeyon/physarum/scripts/reflect-stream-fmt.ts

lb-rl57.title: Create test fixtures and verify formatter
lb-rl57.description: Create tests/sample.jsonl with representative stream-json events (init, assistant with tool calls + thinking, user with tool results, result with cost/turns). Verify: 1) cat tests/sample.jsonl | bun scripts/stream-fmt.ts shows formatted output 2) echo 'plain text' passes through unchanged 3) --raw mode works. This validates the pipeline without running claude-under-claude.
